title: ruta graveolens var. vulgaris
intro: Ruta graveolens var. vulgaris, also known as common rue or garden rue, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of ruta graveolens var. vulgaris include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of ruta graveolens var. vulgaris include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
